seo.title: Bike Burnathon | Cycling Workout | BODi
seo.description: Take on 15 rides that can stand alone as calorie burners or additional cardio to your workout routine.

trainers.bioBodi: Justin is a NASM CPT and former dancer with passion for body mechanics, proper form, and self-care. You'll have so much fun in his cycling and strength workouts that you won't realize he is putting you to WORK! Justin is a certified specialist in Corrective Exercise, Weight Loss, and Heart Rate Performance, Schwinn Cycling and Kettlebell Concepts.

Esmey is a Los Angeles based personal trainer and digital fitness instructor who has helped people achieve their goals and live their best lives for nearly 20 years. She holds NASM personal training and group fitness certifications and is also a Mad Dogg Athletics certified spinning instructor.

Known for her infectious energy and motivational training style, Jenny will quickly become one of your go-to instructors. Her certifications include personal trainer (NASM), group fitness instructor (ACE), and indoor cycling instructor (Schwinn). If you’re interested in strength training, cardio, or cycling, you don’t want to miss her live classes.

Born and raised in Southern California, Shantani was a professional dancer before launching a career in fitness that has seen her train people all over the world and partner with such brands as lululemon and Mirror. Whether she’s leading a cycling class or guiding a sound bath, Shantani inspires people to live their best lives and tap into what makes them hype.

Jared is a triathlete and certified indoor cycling instructor who is constantly exploring new ways to innovate bike training and help his students blow past their goals. When you join Jared’s class, you can expect a ton of energy, hype playlists, heavy hills, heart-pounding sprints, and to always leave sweaty and smiling.

data.descriptionShort: 15 Rides, 1 Goal: Torch fat, build endurance, test your limits.
data.descriptionLong: Tackle hills, all-terrain, and intense intervals in this 15-ride gauntlet that will test your ability to follow through while you build stamina, improve your endurance, and scorch fat.

FUs0T8fs80rhFGfqzX2GQj.descriptionLong: Enhance blood flow, ease muscle tension, and boost mobility and flexibility with a combination of foam-rolling and targeted stretching. The goal: recover faster between workouts so you can keep performing at your peak.

FUs0T8fs80rhFGfqzX2KRv.descriptionLong:
"Don’t wait until you’re tight and sore from an intense ride—join this class today to ease

KM4bAajAkvJT15dtDcCZVr.title: Bike Burnathon: All Terrain (Power Up)
KM4bAajAkvJT15dtDcCZVr.descriptionLong: Feel the adrenaline surge as you navigate through various landscapes, from steep climbs to exhilarating descents. And when you think you've given it your all, get ready for the ultimate challenge: the Power Up segment! Three intense intervals await, where you'll have just two minutes to unleash your strength, elevate your heart rate, and ignite your determination.

trainers.bio: Born and raised in Southern California, Shantani was a professional dancer before launching a career in fitness that has seen her train people all over the world and partner with such brands as lululemon and Mirror. YKpqkp1XqM10L3zGPSmT1U.descriptionLong: Crank up your calorie furnace and build speed and endurance with a high-intensity interval session that will put your focus and stamina to the test. It’s only 30 minutes from start to finish, so HIIT it hard and hold nothing back!

YKpqkp1XqM10L3zGPSmZJo.descriptionLong: Your quads will be on fire by the time you tackle this uphill battle with a "BURN" at the very top! Embrace the challenge to elevate your endurance, boost lower-body power, and torch fat.

trainers.bio: Justin is a NASM CPT and former dancer with a passion for health, wellness and positivity. Certified in Schwinn cycling, heart rate performance, and corrective exercise, he emphasizes good form and a good time in his workouts.

YKpqkp1XqM10L3zGPSmpge.title: Bike Burnathon: All Terrain (Fast Pass)
YKpqkp1XqM10L3zGPSmpge.descriptionLong: This class starts out in the same way as our popular all-terrain rides, but it ends with a unique challenge: Fast Pass—a sequence of eight intervals, each of which requires you to imagine you’re passing the rider in front of you. Go get ’em!
